title: Marchantia agrobacterium transformation of sporelings in multi-well plates
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3jh4v","text":"A modification of the Ishizaki et al 2008 Agrobacterium mediated Marchantia sporeling transformation protocol is used. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":42,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"25be1","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4dfca","text":"Sterilised spores are grown for 5-7 days in ½ strength Gamborg plates prior to co-cultivation for 2 days with agrobacterium in liquid media in multiwell plates. Sporelings are then spread on media with the appropriate selective antibiotic. In about 5 days, positive transformants start to emerge.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Day -7 Spore preparation: Marchantia spores are grown for 7 days in ½ strength Gamborg agar plates (A in Figure).

Day -2 Agrobacterium preparation: Inoculate a single colony of agrobacterium, transformed with the plasmid of interest, into 5mL LB media plus antibiotics, and then incubate at 28°C with shaking at 150 rpm for two days. Day 1 After two days, centrifuge the 5mL agrobacterium culture for 10 minutes at 2000g Re-suspend in 5ml of ½ strength Gamborg’s B5 plus vitamins media with 1% sucrose. Add acetosyringone to a final concentration of 100 μM Incubate with shaking for 6h at 28°C at 150 rpm.
Day 1 Using a sterile scalpel transfer the 5-7 days old Marchantia sporelings in 6 mL of of liquid ½ Gamborg media in a 50 mL Falcon tube (B and C in Figure) and mix well.
Place the 6- well plate on a shaker at 120 rpm for 2 days at 21 o C under continuous light (E in Figure).
Wash the sporelings with 50 mL of sterile water supplemented with 100 μg/ml cefotaxime to remove excessive agrobacterium.
Plate on ½ strength Gamborg B5 plus vitamins 1.2% agar plates with cefotaxime and antibiotics (H and I in Figure)
Day 7 After 5-7 days succesful transformants start to be visible on the plate (J in Figure)
Using a pipette tranfer the sporeling in a 70 or 100 μm cell strainer placed in a 50 mL Falcon tube (F and G in Figure).
Aliquote 3 mL of liquid ½ Gamborg B5 vitamins plus supplements media in each well of a 6-well plate.
Add acetosyringone to each well to a final concenration of 100 μM.
Aliquote 1 mL of spores in each well (D in Figure).
creator: Eftychis Frangedakis
